stem: The side lengths of right triangle ABC are AB = 9, BC = 40, and CA = 41. Triangle ABC is similar to triangle DEF, where B corresponds to E and C corresponds to F. What is the value of tan F?
rationale: Triangle ABC has 9-40-41 sides, with the right angle at B (since 9² + 40² = 41²). Angle C is opposite side AB = 9 and adjacent to side BC = 40, so tan C = 9/40. Since DEF is similar with C↔F, tan F = tan C = 9/40. Choice A is sin C; choice B is cos C; choice C is the reciprocal of tan C.
